title: Mazuri
body:
## About
This is my **first** mod, just keeping it simple, still learning. It is a simple coins mod... 

Introduces **Mazuri Ⓜ** coins including **5 tiers** (1Ⓜ, 5Ⓜ, 20Ⓜ, 100Ⓜ, 1000Ⓜ)

Intended as an exchange item...no other functionality.

Using ores instead of ingots to give them coins an actual value (since iron/ore ingots are farmable) ...and to encourage mining.



I'd appreciate it if you try this mod and tell me what you think. Hope you enjoy!
## Getting **RICH**
- mine *ores* 
- find the *ore cunks* inside them by cutting them with the *stonecutter*
- smelt these *chunks* in a *blast furnace* (normal smelting **won't** work :) )

## Specifics
- iron ore -> 1Ⓜ
- craft: 5 of 1Ⓜ -> 5Ⓜ
- gold ore -> 20Ⓜ
- diamond ore -> 100Ⓜ
- netherrite scrap -> 1000Ⓜ

P.S: Combining and splitting coins is an option!
